summary: Generate mode: Tested CRITICAL Registration Flow - Step 1 (Lead Capture) → Step 2 (Plan Selection) → Payment initiation → Login → Member Dashboard. Backend: 20/20 tests pass. issues.description: Initial page load shows loading spinner for 5-8 seconds before content appears. Consider adding skeleton loaders or optimizing initial data fetch.
razorpay.open() is called twice in MarketingLanding.jsx (line 326-327). This is a duplicate call that could cause issues.
